# Billing start date

It is the start of the period for which [license utilization data](/vault/docs/license/utilization) will be reported for a cluster.

If you do not have an explicit billing start date configured, this defaults to the HashiCorp license start date or the IBM Passport Advantage Online license entitlement start date. Note that, of the matching entitlements in a Passport Advantage Online license key, Vault will select the entitlement with the termination date farthest in the future.

Vault also uses the billing start date as a default start timestamp for:
- [Direct queries via the activity log API](/vault/api-docs/system/internal-counters)
- [Activity export CLI](/vault/api-docs/system/internal-counters#activity-export)

As of 1.16.7, 1.17.3 and later, Vault clusters will automatically adjust the billing start date to provide a year's worth of utilization data.
